title: Storm Craft
description: Welcome to Storm craft, its a small modpack that im making to enhance the normal experience of minecraft with dynamic weather and more.
body:
Welcome to **Storm craft**, its a small modpack that im making to enhance the normal experience of minecraft with a bunch of mods and more importantly dynamic weather.

## Main Features of this modpack:

- This modpack main aim is more Dynamic weather thanks to [ProtoManly's Weather](https://modrinth.com/mod/protomanlys-weather) Mod.
- [Security Craft](https://modrinth.com/mod/security-craft) Is also in the modpack to keep your base more safe from other hostile players.
- [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-voice-chat) Is used to enhance comunication with your friends.


<details>
<summary>Credits to the mods used in the modpack (This list is for the 1.0 version and is currently outdated as of 2.0)</summary>

# This list is currently outdated as of release of 2.0
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)
- [eas addon](https://modrinth.com/mod/eas-addon)
- [ferrite core](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)
- [First person model](https://modrinth.com/mod/first-person-model)
- [Modern fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix)
- [Not enough animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations)
- [ProtoManly's Weather](https://modrinth.com/mod/protomanlys-weather)
- [SecurityCraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/security-craft)
- [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-voice-chat)
- [ Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap)
- [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons)
- [Xaeros world map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map)
- [Tough as nails](https://modrinth.com/mod/tough-as-nails)
- [Open parties and claims](https://modrinth.com/mod/open-parties-and-claims)

</details>
